title: 日本ダービーの後に・スポットライトは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her efforts, Nice Nature fails to catch up
to Tokai Teio in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio expresses her motivation to train even
harder for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature sees this and admires her, musing
that Tokai Teio is truly worthy of being in the
spotlight.
